problem_text_cn: 1087 西藏布达拉宫海拔$z=3756.5\ \mathrm{m}$，不计大气温度随高度的变化，求该处的大气压强$p$。（已知$p_0=1.01\times10^5\ \mathrm{Pa}$，空气摩尔质量$\mu=28.8\times10^{-3}\ \mathrm{kg/mol}$，$R=8.3\ \mathrm{J/(mol\cdot K)}$，$T=273\ \mathrm{K}$）
problem_text_en: 1087 The Potala Palace in Tibet is at an altitude $z=3756.5\ \mathrm{m}$. Neglecting the change of atmospheric temperature with height, find the atmospheric pressure $p$ at this location. (Given $p_0=1.01\times10^5\ \mathrm{Pa}$, molar mass of air $\mu=28.8\times10^{-3}\ \mathrm{kg/mol}$, $R=8.3\ \mathrm{J/(mol\cdot K)}$, $T=273\ \mathrm{K}$)
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】应用**等温大气压公式**$p = p_0 e^{-\frac{\mu g}{RT}z}$，将已知物理量代入公式计算，得到该处大气压强与标准大气压的比值。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Apply the **isothermal atmospheric pressure formula** $p = p_0 e^{-\frac{\mu g}{RT}z}$, substitute the known physical quantities into the formula for calculation, and obtain the ratio of the atmospheric pressure at this location to the standard atmospheric pressure.
problem_answer: 布达拉宫处的大气压强$\boldsymbol{p = 0.63p_0 = 0.63\times10^5\ \mathrm{Pa}}$
